mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT R.REVIEW_NO , PLU_USER.USER_ID , NICKNAME , ORIGIN_PROFILE_NAME , CHANGE_PROFILE_NAME , R.STATION_NO , R.REVIEW_TITLE , R.REVIEW_CONTENT , R.RATING , R.CREATE_DATE AS R_CREATE_DATE , R.MODIFY_DATE , R.STATUS , COUNT(L.REVIEW_NO) OVER(PARTITION BY R.REVIEW_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LIKES WHERE USER_ID = #{user.username} AND R.REVIEW_NO = LIKES.REVIEW_NO) AS LIKED , (SELECT BOOKMARK_NO FROM BOOKMARKS WHERE USER_ID = #{user.username} AND STATION_NO = #{stationNo}) AS BOOKMARK_NO , (SELECT ROUND(AVG(RATING), 2) FROM REVIEW GROUP BY STATION_NO HAVING STATION_NO = #{stationNo}) AS AVG_RATING FROM REVIEW R LEFT JOIN PLU_USER ON (R.USER_ID = PLU_USER.USER_ID) LEFT JOIN PROFILE ON (PROFILE.USER_ID = PLU_USER.USER_ID) LEFT JOIN LIKES L ON (R.REVIEW_NO = L.REVIEW_NO) LEFT JOIN BOOKMARKS B ON (PLU_USER.USER_ID = B.USER_ID) WHERE R.STATUS = 'Y' AND R.STATION_NO = #{stationNo} ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC , R.CREATE_DATE DESC FETCH NEXT 3 ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEW WHERE STATION_NO = #{stationNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT DISTINCT R.REVIEW_NO , PLU_USER.USER_ID , NICKNAME , ORIGIN_PROFILE_NAME , CHANGE_PROFILE_NAME , R.STATION_NO , R.REVIEW_TITLE , R.REVIEW_CONTENT , R.RATING , R.CREATE_DATE AS R_CREATE_DATE , R.MODIFY_DATE , R.STATUS , COUNT(L.REVIEW_NO) OVER(PARTITION BY R.REVIEW_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LIKES WHERE USER_ID = #{user.username} AND R.REVIEW_NO = LIKES.REVIEW_NO) AS LIKED , (SELECT BOOKMARK_NO FROM BOOKMARKS WHERE USER_ID = #{user.username} AND STATION_NO = #{stationNo}) AS BOOKMARK_NO , (SELECT ROUND(AVG(RATING), 2) FROM REVIEW GROUP BY STATION_NO HAVING STATION_NO = #{stationNo}) AS AVG_RATING FROM REVIEW R LEFT JOIN PLU_USER ON (R.USER_ID = PLU_USER.USER_ID) LEFT JOIN PROFILE ON (PROFILE.USER_ID = PLU_USER.USER_ID) LEFT JOIN LIKES L ON (R.REVIEW_NO = L.REVIEW_NO) LEFT JOIN BOOKMARKS B ON (PLU_USER.USER_ID = B.USER_ID) WHERE R.STATUS = 'Y' AND R.STATION_NO = #{stationNo} ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC , R.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT DISTINCT R.REVIEW_NO , PLU_USER.USER_ID , NICKNAME , ORIGIN_PROFILE_NAME , CHANGE_PROFILE_NAME , R.STATION_NO , R.REVIEW_TITLE , R.REVIEW_CONTENT , R.RATING , R.CREATE_DATE AS R_CREATE_DATE , R.MODIFY_DATE , R.STATUS , COUNT(L.REVIEW_NO) OVER(PARTITION BY R.REVIEW_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LIKES WHERE USER_ID = #{user.username} AND R.REVIEW_NO = LIKES.REVIEW_NO) AS LIKED , (SELECT BOOKMARK_NO FROM BOOKMARKS WHERE USER_ID = #{user.username} AND STATION_NO = #{stationNo}) AS BOOKMARK_NO , (SELECT ROUND(AVG(RATING), 2) FROM REVIEW GROUP BY STATION_NO HAVING STATION_NO = #{stationNo}) AS AVG_RATING FROM REVIEW R LEFT JOIN PLU_USER ON (R.USER_ID = PLU_USER.USER_ID) LEFT JOIN PROFILE ON (PROFILE.USER_ID = PLU_USER.USER_ID) LEFT JOIN LIKES L ON (R.REVIEW_NO = L.REVIEW_NO) LEFT JOIN BOOKMARKS B ON (PLU_USER.USER_ID = B.USER_ID) WHERE R.STATUS = 'Y' AND R.STATION_NO = #{stationNo} ORDER BY R.CREATE_DATE DESC , LIKE_COUNT DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT REVIEW_NO , USER_ID , STATION_NO , REVIEW_TITLE , REVIEW_CONTENT , RATING , CREATE_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , STATUS FROM REVIEW WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.delete: UPDATE REVIEW SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
